sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106677" key="u(=ma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὗμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὕω</etym>) <sense id="n106677.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὕσμα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
